settings.title: Pay via UPI
settings.summary: Fast checkout using popular UPI apps.

settings.title: Cash on Delivery (COD)
settings.summary: Pay ₹100 now, and the rest on delivery.

settings.methods_intro: We support quick, secure checkout across UPI, cards, netbanking, and more.
settings.methods_notes: Available payment methods may vary by order value or account history. COD may be disabled for repeated rejections or high return patterns.
settings.security_intro: We invest in best-in-class systems and certifications to keep your data safe.
settings.sec_point2: Card data is never stored on our servers.
settings.security_note: If a payment fails, your bank may place a temporary hold. It will auto-reverse as per their timelines.
settings.inv_intro: We provide invoices for in-store and online purchases.
settings.inv_store: Visit any store with your receipt to request an invoice copy.
settings.inv_online: Place your order using your details. If you need a business invoice, choose 'Purchase as a company' and fill in GST details.
settings.gift_intro: Use virtual or physical gift cards and store credits seamlessly at checkout.
settings.gift_point1: Store credits never expire and can be combined with other payment methods.
settings.gift_point2: Apply your code in the 'Gift card or discount code' box at checkout.
settings.gift_point3: If your order exceeds the credit balance, pay the remaining amount using any other method.
settings.credit_help_text: Lost your code? Contact support and we’ll help you retrieve it.
settings.help_text: Can’t find what you’re looking for?

settings.label: Key takeaways
settings.item1: We collect only what’s needed (contact details, account info, and basic usage data) when you interact with us.
settings.item2: Your data helps us run and improve the site, answer support queries, and send updates.
settings.item3: We use cookies to remember preferences and understand site usage; you can control cookies in your browser.
settings.item4: Some third-party tools/ads we use have their own privacy policies.
settings.item5: We do not share or monetize from the data you share with us.

settings.content: By using Lagorii’s website, you consent to this Privacy Policy, which applies to information collected online through our site. We may ask for personal details (like name, email, phone, address, or account info) when you register, place an order, or contact us; if you message us, we receive the details you share (including attachments). We also collect standard log and usage data (such as IP address, browser, ISP, pages visited, timestamps, and clicks) to operate, secure, and improve the site. We use your information to provide and enhance our services, personalize content, communicate updates and support, send emails you opt into, and prevent fraud; we do not sell your personal information. Like most websites, we use cookies to remember preferences and understand how the site is used—you can manage or disable cookies in your browser settings. Ads, analytics, payment, or other third-party services we use may place their own cookies or receive technical data (e.g., IP) when their content loads; their practices are governed by their own privacy policies, which we encourage you to review. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13; if you believe a child has provided us data, please contact care@lagorii.com and we’ll remove it. For questions, or to request access, correction, or deletion of your information, contact us at care@lagorii.com. We may update this policy from time to time; continued use of the site means you accept the revised policy.
